messages.content: Friends, please PM me in case you could actually make it to the Blood Donation Camp on April 1, 2011...this would help us giving you, your respective Donor cards...

I request all friends here to come forward and join this noble cause. Every unit of blood that you donate can be used for three life-saving purposes:
Â· Red blood cells for surgery, kidney dialysis and anaemia
Â· Plasma to treat burn victims
Â· Platelets for surgery, leukaemia and other forms of cancer
Those interested can PM me. Thank You

At:
	
Moksha
22, Camac Street. Block - A, 5th Floor, Kolkata 700 016. (Above Pizza Hut, Beside Pantaloons, West Side)
Kolkata (Calcutta), India

Friends....please help me win a expense paid trip to Mumbai to watch the Final of the Circket World cup between India and Sri Lanka

CLICK ON THE LINK AND LIKE THE PHOTO ON THE CASTROL PAGE NOT HERE

Friends...

Once you have selected the following options for this Blood Donation Camp

1. Attending (Yahoo...you will certainly make a difference)
2. May be Attending (Please try you level best to make it)
3. Not Attending (No issues, better luck next time to the needed ones)

Just select the button (+Select Guests to Invite) below the image on the left side...send the event invite to all your friends as well. By doing this we would atleast increase awareness of the same which would automatically result in increase in participation...

Thank You for extending your helping hand
